background_setting: Professionally lit boxing ring with taut ropes, polished canvas, dramatic spotlights, metallic suit accents, and crowded arena stands filled with cheering spectators.

lighting.conditions: Bright overhead arena spotlights isolate the ring while the stands remain darker with flickers of audience light.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Bright overhead arena spotlights isolate the ring while the stands remain darker with flickers of audience light.

aesthetics.composition: Stylized sports spectacle, glossy black suits, gold accents, soft animal fur, theatrical lighting, and tense pre-match energy.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Stylized sports spectacle, glossy black suits, gold accents, soft animal fur, theatrical lighting, and tense pre-match energy.

cinematography.camera_motion: Dynamic medium-wide ring shot with the referee centered, slight low angle, and subtle camera drift around the opposing contenders.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Cinematic anthropomorphic boxing scene with polished arena drama and crisp character detail.
context: A tabby cat boxer and a panda boxer face each other in a vibrant boxing ring while a referee raises a golden glove to start the match.

actions.description: The camera establishes the lit ring as the tabby cat and panda face each other with the referee between them.
The referee raises the golden glove, the crowd cheers, and both contenders tighten their guards.
The cat and panda bounce lightly in place, ready for the opening signal as the arena energy rises.

segments.description: Introduce the ring, the cat boxer, panda boxer, referee, and cheering crowd.
segments.key_changes: Spotlights flare, suits gleam, audience movement builds behind the ropes.

segments.description: Center the referee lifting the golden glove between the contenders.
segments.key_changes: Golden glove rises, both boxers raise guards, crowd motion intensifies.
segments.camera: Slow push toward the referee and fighters.

segments.description: Hold on the pre-match tension as the fighters bounce in place.
segments.key_changes: Cat and panda shift weight, gloves stay high, ring lights glint off gold accents.
segments.camera: Subtle circular camera drift around center ring.

temporal_caption: A tabby cat boxer and a panda boxer face off in a bright arena while a referee raises a golden glove and the crowd cheers.
audio_description: Crowd cheers, muffled arena rumble, soft glove creaks, shoe scuffs on canvas, and a sharp referee breath before the signal.
